since_last: 30% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.38%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.38% · Gold -0.76% · Nasdaq100 -1.79%. 30% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.38%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.38%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at -9.95%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.91%, WDAY +4.12%, INTU +3.32%, NOW +2.59%, META +2.55%. Laggards: AMBA -9.95%, TER -9.60%, INTC -9.57%, AVAV -8.10%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.75% at $149.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
